live_fields.value: FQ3 FY25 guided to RECORD revenue ~$8.80B with a further non-GAAP gross-margin step-down to ~36.5% (from FQ2 actual ~37.9% non-GAAP / 36.8% GAAP); FQ2 non-GAAP EPS $1.56 beat. HBM revenue >$1B/qtr and data-center DRAM at a record. The guided GM step-down (mix/consumer softness) is the contemporaneous bear tell.

sources.note: 8-K press release (S1) FQ3 outlook: record revenue ~$8.80B, non-GAAP GM ~36.5%

live_fields.value: As of FQ2 FY25 (reported 2025-03-20): HBM revenue crossed >$1B/quarter, data-center DRAM hit a record, and data-center revenue tripled YoY surpassing 50% of total (per FQ1). Micron is 1 of 3 HBM suppliers; HBM durability across a full cycle is the open thesis question. No post-as_of HBM milestones are used.
